questions.question: What does Paul say about those who judge others while doing the same things?
According to Paul, what leads people to repentance?
Paul argues that having the Law automatically makes someone righteous before God.
For it is not the hearers of the law who are righteous before God, but the _____ of the law will be justified.
For he is not a Jew who is one outwardly, neither is that circumcision which is outward in the flesh; but he is a Jew who is one _____, and circumcision is that of the heart.
